artists.name: Claude Monet
artists.signature_description: Bold cursive 'Monet' typically in lower-right corner, often in dark blue or black

artists.name: Vincent van Gogh
artists.signature_description: Distinctive angular 'Vincent' in red or dark paint, usually lower-left

artists.name: Pierre-Auguste Renoir
artists.signature_description: Flowing cursive 'Renoir' in lower-left or lower-right, often in red or brown

artists.name: Edgar Degas
artists.signature_description: Small precise 'Degas' often in upper-right or lower-right, sometimes in pencil

artists.name: Paul Cezanne
artists.signature_description: Bold angular 'Cezanne' usually in lower-right, in dark paint

artists.name: Camille Pissarro
artists.signature_description: Small neat 'Pissarro' usually in lower-left, often in dark paint

artists.name: Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec
artists.signature_description: Distinctive monogram 'HTL' or full name in upper-left, often in red

artworks.title: Bal du Moulin de la Galette
The Dance Class in the Studio
The Card Players at the Table
At the Moulin Rouge in Paris
